text: I'll add this and I think it's something that some of you already know. Owning a car back then was a sign of wealth in some way because people used to pay cash and only higher individuals in the society would accord such luxury. Nowadays, cars are very expensive to maintain and a huge liability if you're not generating any value from owning that car. We have many car hiring services nowadays that you can hire vehicles use them and return without "owning" the liability part of it. Things have changed. Usijipee pressure. Maisha safari.
